title: Add TubeBoost AI to build
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [TubeBoost AI](https://tubeboost.kr) to build
- TubeBoost AI helps creators translate YouTube video metadata such as titles.

Fixes #10958

gist.headline: TubeBoost AI takes root
gist.blurb: TubeBoost AI just sprouted in our community greenhouse! It's a handy tool built on Pollinations that helps creators translate their YouTube video titles and metadata.
gist.summary: Added TubeBoost AI, a community-built tool for translating YouTube video metadata, to the apps showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover TubeBoost AI in the community directory to help localize their video content.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee interacting with a retro TV or monitor showing a play button, representing YouTube/video content, alongside translation or metadata symbols like a dictionary or text blocks.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny director's beret, watching a retro CRT TV that displays a chunky red play button. A small pixelated dictionary sits next to a lime green (#ecf874) flower pot with code-plants sprouting out. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and nostalgic.
